code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    macd = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], window_slow=params['macd_slow'], window_fast=params['macd_fast'], window_sign=params['macd_signal']).macd_diff()
    signals = pd.Series(np.where((rsi > params['rsi_upper']) & (macd < 0), -1, np.where((rsi < params['rsi_lower']) & (macd > 0), 1, 0)), index=df.index)
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits momentum divergence where discrepancies between RSI and MACD indicators signal potential reversals.
